title: Results of replicated evaluation of new chickpea germplasm accessions from Madhya Pradesh, India
abstract: This is the fourth report on results of replicated evaluation of chickpea germplasm. He have been testing specific sets of germplasm accessions for their agronomic performance and results were distributed to chickpea workers. The evaluation is carried out in replicated and relatively larger plot size. By the term germplasm set we mean accessions that were sampled from a particular geographic region or country and have some similarity in morphoagronomic characteristics.
